Go to https://staging.new.expensify.com/ 2. Navigate to the Reports page > click filter `From` ## Expected Result: We should remove AMs from these filters, especially once the AM has been unassigned. ## Actual Result: Account Managers get added as "hidden" members of their managed customer workspaces so they can better support the customer. They should be completely invisible but, when using filters in the Reports tab, the AM is appearing. This is confusing for the customer. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos Check details in the [OP](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C07NMDKEFMH/p1772431936624929) [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Log in with Expensify account as the workspace admin 3. Go to workspace settings > Company cards 4. Tap on Assign 5. In the member search field, type the email address of the non-existent user 6. Tap on the email address of the new user 7. Complete the necessary steps to send the invitation to the new user 8. Proceed with and complete the remaining steps of the card assignment process 9. Tap Assign card ## Expected Result: A new user account is created, and the card is assigned to the new user. The user is redirected to the card details page, displaying the card as assigned to the new user. ## Actual Result: The user stays in the same "Let's double check" page. The user is successfully added as a member to the workspace. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [x] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [x] iOS: mWeb Safari - [x] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/128e4679-f9ae-40dc-bb5e-22c94adf7b45 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.27.2 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** N/A - new feature, doesn't exist in prod **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/81380 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** ibellicotest+2250@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Motorola MotoG60 / Android 12 (Hybrid app) **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: Prerequisite: Account has at least one workspace. 1. Open the Expensify app. 2. Open any workspace chat. 3. Create a manual expense. 4. Open the just created expense and tap on the "+" button on receipt thumbnail. 5. Upload an image of a receipt. 6. Click on the receipt to open the receipt modal. 7. Tap on the "Crop" button. 8. Select a zone to crop and save the image. 9. Reopen the receipt. 10. Note that the zone that was cropped from the image is bigger than the selected one. ## Expected Result: The part of a receipt that the user cropped, has to remain the same after saving the edition. ## Actual Result: After cropping and saving a receipt, a bigger zone of the image disappears, and not only the part that the user selected to crop. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5e1d45e0-448d-48df-9f5c-e4a0ece0bded [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

title: [$250] Show Create Report CTA for users without a workspace

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: NewFeature
labels.description: Something to build that is a new item.

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

body:
Slack Thread Context: https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C07HPDRELLD/p1772192679455179?thread_ts=1772192679.455179&cid=C07HPDRELLD **What the problem is:** Users without a workspace don't see the **Create report** CTA, even though we commonly expose workspace-gated features with an upgrade/create-workspace prompt. **What the expected output is:** Show the **Create report** button for users even when they don't yet have a workspace, and when clicked, prompt them via the standard upgrade modal flow (and then proceed to workspace creation as applicable). **Debugging info:** - Affects: users with **no workspace** vs users **with a workspace** (UI differs). - Expected interaction pattern referenced: show CTA → display the existing "upgrade modal" used in other flows that prompt workspace creation to access the feature. **Potential solutions or implementation notes (if applicable):** - Implement: display **Create report** CTA for no-workspace users. - On click: open the standard upgrade modal first (consistent with other gated feature flows), then route into create-workspace flow (e.g., RHP) with report-specific copy if needed. Moved from https://github.com/Expensify/Expensify/issues/605145
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @eVoloshchak

If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.27-2 **Reproducible in staging?:** Y **Reproducible in production?:** Y **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** **Logs:** https://stackoverflow.com/c/expensify/questions/4856 **Expensify/Expensify Issue URL:** **Issue reported by:** @bernhardoj **Slack conversation** (hyperlinked to channel name): [#Expensify Bugs](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C049HHMV9SM/p1772195745232479) ## Action Performed: Turn on "Simulate failing network requests" 2. Go to Inbox 3. Press the global create button > Start chat 4. Start a chat with a user you never chatted with before. The chat creation should be failed. 5. Tap the create chat error clear button ## Expected Result: User redirected to the concierge chat ## Actual Result: User stay at the error report ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ba77611c-46cf-4120-a4ce-ed9cdfd49aa8 https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/664113b5-b315-4aa8-9cf5-c302fde83e54 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @hungvu193
